title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Impresario Entertainment Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Impresario Entertainment Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Impresario Entertainment Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Pune. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Impresario Entertainment Asia Pacific Associates:
Impresario Entertainment Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Barista Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Impresario Entertainment Asia Pacific Associates!
